parsed.production_notes: The image exhibits characteristics typical of AI generation, such as overly smooth skin textures and slightly unnatural lighting on the subject's face. The background cityscape is also somewhat generic and lacks sharp detail.

scenes.setting: Modern office interior with large windows overlooking a city skyline at sunset or sunrise. Warm, golden hour lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman stands in a modern office space, framed from the chest up. She wears a dark purple blazer. Her dark hair is pulled back neatly. She looks directly at the camera with a neutral, confident expression. Behind her are large floor-to-ceiling windows. Through the windows, a blurred cityscape is visible under warm, golden light, suggesting early morning or late afternoon.

scenes.visual_description: The top half of the image features a professional woman in a purple blazer standing in front of large office windows with a city view. The bottom half is a solid purple block containing marketing text. The text reads 'CHEAPER THAN A TUTOR.' in white, followed by 'BETTER FOR YOUR CAREER.' in yellow. Below this, smaller white text says 'Daily AI practice. Less than one lesson a month. Real results at work.' At the very bottom is an orange button with black text saying 'TRY FLUENTLY'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
CHEAPER THAN A TUTOR.
BETTER FOR YOUR CAREER.
Daily AI practice. Less than one lesson a month. Real results at work.
TRY FLUENTLY
